---
title: "Site launched"
description: >-
  The public site for the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice series is now
  online — a single entry-point for papers, research artefacts, and
  programme news.
author: "Jack D. Menendez"
date: "2026-05-19"
categories: [meta, site]
---

This site replaces a temporary placeholder at the same domain and
gives the series a unified, author-controlled public face.

At launch, the site is intentionally lean:

- The [papers page](../../papers/index.qmd) lists every paper in the
  series with its current state — published-and-DOI'd, drafted, or
  planned — and links out to the canonical Zenodo and GitHub
  surfaces.
- The [research artefacts page](../../artefacts/index.qmd) hosts the
  first interactive object: a 3D model of the bipartite octahedral
  lattice unit cell.
- The [collaborators](../../collaborators.qmd) and
  [funding](../../funding.qmd) pages exist as attribution surfaces
  that grow as the programme grows.

Future news posts will track concrete milestones: paper releases,
Zenodo deposits, talks, audit-row flips, and framework-level
decisions. The cadence is deliberate — every post should mark
something a reader could verify against the published record.
